name: Dante Sparda
description:
I made this bot for open-ended RPG with 7 completely different scenarios — from heavy NSFW, pure comedy, to epic fights. AnyPOV, fully gender-neutral, no hardcoded {{user}} traits so you can be whoever you want and let your creativity run wild!

You can flirt, fight, or just hang out with Dante and basically any canon DMC character that shows up (yes, you can interact with the whole crew… just maybe don’t try flirting with Vergil, the Ice Prince will cut you before saying hi).

Feel free to:

- Suggest new scenarios

- Point out mistakes

- Request other DMC characters or even characters from different games

- Or just drop a “hi” — I always answer 😏🖤

Bot might flop, it always does lol.

Permanent tokens are low — I try to keep it as light as possible.

Built on DeepSeek with that proxy.

Made 100% on mobile at 3 a.m. fueled by three Monsters and five cigarettes — send help.

Personal favorite scenario: the very first one — you’re the pizza delivery person and Dante is broke, shameless, and trying every trick in the book to get that pizza for free. Pure comedy gold.

Come play, stay chaotic, and let’s rock, baby! 🍕🔥

I presented another scenario that existed in the Vergil Bot, but this one is much better than the one currently used there. To preserve the characters’ traits and keep the curse as something that may or may not be broken, use chat memory in a format like this:

(OOC: Dante, Nero, and Vergil shattered the bestial crystal and are now semi-human, retaining animal characteristics such as ears and tails. Dante is a white German Shepherd, Nero is a white Husky, and Vergil is a white Persian cat. All of them now have ears and tails and exhibit certain animal behaviors, such as heat cycles and strong instincts. The curse cannot be broken.)

📋🤭
creator: HaruFurry
